NAVAREA XIX 17/26
 NORWEGIAN SEA BARENTS SEA 
 1.  LAUNCH OF ONE SCIENTIFIC RESEARCH ROCKETS FROM ANDOEYA. WILL TAKE PLACE. BETWEEN 0900 AND 1515 UTC, WITHIN THE PERIOD 02 TO 09 FEB 26. 
 BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA;

 A. 71-43.00N 008-19.00E
 B. 70-59.00N 010-11.00E
 C. 71-14.00N 012-02.00E
 D. 72-00.00N 010-06.00E
 E. 71-43.00N 008-19.00E

 FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 44 28 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16. E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO. WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS.
  
 2.  NORWEGIAN NOTICES TO MARINERS 02/ 2026  REFFERS
